# Mina Samy Tawfik Saad

Canonical profile: https://minasami.github.io/
Location: Cairo and 6th of October City, Egypt
Primary positioning: Life sciences project management, PMO governance, digital health innovation, healthcare operations, medicine access programs
Professional identity: Licensed Pharmacist and project management professional

## Summary
Mina Samy Tawfik Saad is a project management and PMO professional with experience coordinating healthcare, pharmaceutical, operational and technical initiatives. His work includes project planning, stakeholder management, governance documentation, process mapping, risk identification, KPI reporting, workflow automation, implementation support and change management.

## Budget and partnership scope
Mina is responsible for coordinating and tracking a healthcare support portfolio of approximately EGP 120M+, with emphasis on budget visibility, governance, partner coordination, operational reporting and service continuity.

He works with major public-health and medicine-access ecosystem stakeholders including Egypt Cure Bank, Raie Masr, Masr Bela Marad and other healthcare support organizations, providers, pharmacies and suppliers.

## Flagship project: Medicine Support Hub
Project page: https://minasami.github.io/medicine-support-hub/
Live platform: https://medicine-support-hub--minasamitawfik.replit.app/
Medicine Support Hub is a digital health operations platform concept for chronic medicines support programs. It is designed to improve request workflows, role-based dashboards, partner visibility, reporting, budget tracking, procurement tracking and program impact measurement.

## Core capabilities
- Project planning and execution
- PMO governance and project controls
- Stakeholder and cross-functional coordination
- Risk and issue management
- Executive reporting and KPI dashboards
- Healthcare and pharmaceutical operations
- Digital health workflow design
- Process improvement and automation
- Technical requirements and cloud delivery
- Change management and user adoption

## Career timeline
- Senior Coordinator - Digital Transformation & Operational Excellence, EVA Pharma & Armanious Foundation, 2025-present
- Healthcare Projects & Process Digitalisation Coordinator, EVA Pharma & Armanious Foundation, 2023-2025
- Operations Programme Coordinator, Masr Bela Marad NGO, 2022-2023
- Freelance Digital Systems & Cloud Solutions, 2014-2023
